SEARCH
Package org.skeleton.player

Class Snowplow

java.lang.Object
org.skeleton.vehicle.Vehicle
org.skeleton.player.Snowplow
public class Snowplow extends Vehicle
Specialized vehicle for cleaning snow from lanes. Equipped with interchangeable plow heads and an inventory for resources.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Snowplow()
    Constructs a new Snowplow with default equipment.

  • Constructor Details

    • Snowplow

      public Snowplow()
      Constructs a new Snowplow with default equipment.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentHead

      public PlowHead getCurrentHead()
      Gets the currently active plow head.
      Returns:
      The active plow head.

    • changeHead

      public void changeHead(PlowHead head)
      Changes the active plow head. The old head is moved to the inventory.
      Parameters:
      head - The new head to equip.

    • move

      public boolean move(Node targetNode, Lane viaLane)
      Moves the snowplow through a lane to a target node. Cleans the lane during movement.
      Parameters:
      targetNode - The destination node.
      viaLane - The lane used for travel.
      Returns:
      true if movement was successful, false otherwise.

    • move

      public boolean move(Lane destination)
      Description copied from class: Vehicle
      Megpróbálja elmozdítani a járművet a megadott sávra.
      Overrides:
      move in class Vehicle
      Parameters:
      destination - A cél sáv.
      Returns:
      true, ha a mozgás sikeres volt, egyébként false.

    • addResource

      public void addResource(Resource type, int amount)
      Adds a resource to the snowplow's inventory.
      Parameters:
      type - The resource type.
      amount - The amount to add.

    • getInventory

      public Inventory getInventory()
      Gets the snowplow's inventory.
      Returns:
      The inventory instance.

    • resetMoves

      public void resetMoves()
      Resets the movement points for a new turn.

    • setOwner

      public void setOwner(Player p)
      Sets the owner of this snowplow.
      Parameters:
      p - The owner player.
